metadata.name: Guest Sponsor Info – Azure Function Proxy
metadata.description: Deploys an Azure Function App that acts as a Graph API proxy for the Guest Sponsor Info SharePoint web part. Includes a Storage Account, App Service Plan, EasyAuth configuration, Managed Identity role assignments, Log Analytics Workspace, and Application Insights.
metadata.author: jpawlowski

metadata.description: Azure region for all resources.
Entra tenant ID (GUID).
Tenant name without domain suffix, e.g. "contoso".
Globally unique name for the Function App (2–58 characters, letters, numbers, and hyphens only).
Client ID of the App Registration created for EasyAuth.

Hosting plan for the Function App. "Consumption" = Y1/Dynamic (free tier included, cold starts after ~20 min idle, ZIP served directly from GitHub package URL). "FlexConsumption" = FC1/Linux-only (no free tier, cold starts greatly reduced — alwaysReadyInstances=1 eliminates them; ZIP is uploaded to blob storage by the provisioning script automatically during ARM deployment; "Deploy to Azure" button is supported). Not all Azure regions support Flex Consumption — check https://aka.ms/flex-region before choosing.

Number of always-ready (pre-warmed) instances for the Function App (Flex Consumption plan only). 0 = purely on-demand (cold starts possible). 1 = one instance kept warm — eliminates cold starts (~€2–5/month). Ignored when hostingPlan = "Consumption".

Hard upper bound on the number of instances the Flex Consumption plan may scale out to (Flex Consumption plan only). Acts as a cost ceiling — scale-out stops at this limit regardless of demand. Valid range: 1–1000. Default: 10. Ignored when hostingPlan = "Consumption".

Memory allocated to each Flex Consumption instance in MB (Flex Consumption plan only). Valid values: 512 or 2048. Higher memory allows more concurrent requests per instance but costs more per GB-second. Default: 2048. Ignored when hostingPlan = "Consumption".

Function package version to deploy. "latest" (default) = always pull the newest GitHub Release at provisioning time. SemVer without "v" prefix, e.g. "1.4.2" = pin to that specific release. On Consumption: sets the WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE URL. On Flex Consumption: the provisioning script re-runs and re-uploads the ZIP whenever this value changes — set it on each redeployment to trigger a code update.
Override the computed package ZIP URL. Leave empty (default) to auto-compute from appVersion. Use only when hosting the ZIP at a custom location.
Additional resource tags to apply to all deployed resources. The tags "managed-by", "source", and "package-version" are always set automatically and cannot be overridden.
Deploy Azure Maps account for inline address map preview.
Optional custom Azure Maps account name. Leave empty to auto-generate.
Enable operational email alert for probable service outage (5xx/504 spike or low success rate).
Enable operational email alert for auth/config regressions (AUTH_CONFIG_* reason codes).
Enable info-only alert for likely attack/noise spikes (high 401/403 from many IPs).
KQL alert evaluation frequency in minutes.
KQL alert lookback window in minutes.
Minimum total requests in window before service outage alert can fire.
5xx/504 count threshold for service outage alert.
Success-rate percentage threshold below which service outage alert can fire.
AUTH_CONFIG_* trace count threshold for config-regression alert.
401/403 count threshold for likely-attack info alert.
Unique client IP threshold for likely-attack info alert.
Denied-rate percentage threshold for likely-attack info alert.
Minimum successful requests required before likely-attack info alert fires (avoid pure outage overlap).

Consumption plan (Y1) daily memory-time budget in GB-seconds. When hit, the Function App is suspended until midnight UTC — the primary cost guard. 0 = unlimited (not recommended). Default 10 000 GB-s ≈ 13 000 typical invocations/day, stays within the monthly free tier (400 000 GB-s/month). Ignored when hostingPlan = "FlexConsumption" (Flex has no daily GB-second budget concept).
Action group resource IDs for operational email alerts. Leave empty to create alert rules without notifications.
Action group resource IDs for info-only alerts. Leave empty to create alert rules without notifications.
Optional notification email used to auto-create default operational/info action groups. Leave empty to skip auto-creation.
Short name for the auto-created operational action group (max 12 chars).
Short name for the auto-created info action group (max 12 chars).

variables.authConfigRegressionAlertQueryRaw:
let window = __WINDOW__m;
traces
| where timestamp > ago(window)
| where message has "Client validation ("
| extend reasonCode = tostring(customDimensions.reasonCode)
| where reasonCode in ("AUTH_CONFIG_TENANT_MISSING", "AUTH_CONFIG_AUDIENCE_MISSING")
| summarize hits = count() by reasonCode
| where hits >= __HITS_THRESHOLD__

properties.scriptContent:
set -euo pipefail
      curl -sSfL -o /tmp/function.zip "$PACKAGE_URL"
      for attempt in 1 2 3; do
        az storage blob upload \
          --account-name "$STORAGE_ACCOUNT" \
          --container-name "$CONTAINER" \
          --name function.zip \
          --file /tmp/function.zip \
          --auth-mode login \
          --overwrite && break || {
            echo "Upload attempt $attempt failed — waiting for RBAC propagation"
            sleep 30
          }
      done

siteConfig.appSettings: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'AzureWebJobsStorage__accountName', 'value', if(greater(length(variables('storageAccountName')), 24), substring(variables('storageAccountName'), 0, 24), variables('storageAccountName'))), createObject('name', 'AzureWebJobsStorage__credential', 'value', 'managedidentity'), createObject('name', 'TENANT_ID', 'value', parameters('tenantId')), createObject('name', 'ALLOWED_AUDIENCE', 'value', format('api://guest-sponsor-info-proxy/{0}', parameters('functionClientId'))), createObject('name', 'CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGIN', 'value', format('https://{0}.sharepoint.com', parameters('tenantName'))), createObject('name', 'SPONSOR_LOOKUP_TIMEOUT_MS', 'value', '5000'), createObject('name', 'BATCH_TIMEOUT_MS', 'value', '4000'), createObject('name', 'PRESENCE_TIMEOUT_MS', 'value', '2500'), createObject('name', 'NODE_ENV', 'value', 'production'), createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', variables('appInsightsName')), '2020-02-02').ConnectionString), createObject('name', 'APP_VERSION', 'value', parameters('appVersion'))), variables('consumptionOnlyAppSettings'))]

properties.description: Operational email alert for probable service outage (5xx/504 spike or low success rate).
Operational email alert for auth/config regressions (AUTH_CONFIG_* reason codes).
Info-only alert for likely attack/noise spikes (high 401/403 from many IPs).

metadata.description: The base URL of the deployed Function App. Paste this into the SPFx web part property pane (Azure Function Base URL field).
The full function endpoint URL — use this for curl/Postman testing or health checks. The web part property pane only needs the base URL (functionAppUrl).
Object ID of the system-assigned Managed Identity — needed for setup-graph-permissions.ps1.
Name of the Application Insights component — open in the Azure Portal for live telemetry.
The selected hosting plan — included in outputs for operational visibility.
Azure Maps account name (empty when deployAzureMaps=false).
Azure CLI command to fetch the Azure Maps primary key (empty when deployAzureMaps=false).

azureMapsKeyCommand.value: [if(parameters('deployAzureMaps'), format('az maps account keys list -g {0} -n {1} --query primaryKey -o tsv', resourceGroup().name, variables('azureMapsName')), '')]

metadata.description: Name of the Storage Account. For Flex Consumption: upload updated ZIPs to the app-package container here to trigger a redeployment (use --auth-mode login). For Consumption: the runtime uses this account for trigger state and blob/queue/table operations.
The function package version deployed. "latest" = newest release at provisioning time; otherwise the pinned SemVer tag without "v" prefix.
